title: My Heart Has Heard an Oracle

verses.text: He views himself with blind conceit And sinfulness denies. He speaks with false and evil tongue, No longer good or wise.
Your righteousness is very great, Like mountains high and steep; Your justice, like the ocean depths. Both man and beast you keep.
To those who know you as their God Your steadfast love impart; Maintain your righteousness to those Of pure and upright heart.
